content: Paul initially had some dollars, but the amount is not specified. If he received 11 dollars, he would be able to buy 2 toys (11 ÷ 5 = 2.2, but since you can't buy a fraction of a toy, we round down to 2).
raw_content: Paul initially had some dollars, but the amount is not specified. If he received 11 dollars, he would be able to buy 2 toys (11 ÷ 5 = 2.2, but since you can't buy a fraction of a toy, we round down to 2).
